metodos.codigoOriginal:
lcSep = Set([Separator])
lcPto = Set([Point])
Set Point To [,]
Set Separator To [.]

Do Case
	Case Inlist(thisform.optTipo.Value,1,2)
		Report form SigReCr8 To Print NoConsole
	Case thisform.optTipo.Value = 3
		Report form SigReCr7 To Print NoConsole
	Case thisform.optTipo.Value = 4
		Report form SigReCr9 To Print NoConsole
Endcase

Set Point To lcPto
Set Separator To lcSep

lcSep = Set([Separator])
lcPto = Set([Point])
Set Point To [,]
Set Separator To [.]

Do Case
	Case Inlist(thisform.optTipo.Value,1,2)

	Case thisform.optTipo.Value = 3
		Report form SigReCr7 To Print Prompt NoConsole
	Case thisform.optTipo.Value = 4
		Report form SigReCr9 To Print Prompt NoConsole
Endcase

Set Point To lcPto
Set Separator To lcSep

lcQrySigCdEmp = [Select cemps,razas From SigCdEmp Where cemps=']+_Empr+[']

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		With .poDataMgr
			.AddCursor('SigCdEmp', 'cemps', 'crSigCdEmp', '', , lcQrySigCdEmp)
			
			lcRetSigCdEmp = .ReQuery('crSigCdEmp')
		EndWith
		
		If 	(lcRetSigCdEmp < 1)
			=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo ( Requery(s) )')
			Return 0
		EndIf

Set Separator To [.]

Do Case
	Case Inlist(thisform.optTipo.Value,1,2)
		Report form SigReCr8 preview NoConsole
	Case thisform.optTipo.Value = 3
		Report form SigReCr7 preview NoConsole
	Case thisform.optTipo.Value = 4
		Report form SigReCr9 preview NoConsole
Endcase

Set Point To lcPto
Set Separator To lcSep

If !IsEmpty(this.value)
	fAcessoContab(Usuar,'D',this.value,This.Parent.get_Cd_Grestoque,This)
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Grestoque.value = ''
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Grestoque.refresh
endif
return(.t.)

If !IsEmpty(this.value)
	fAcessoContab(Usuar,'C',this.value,This,This.Parent.get_Ds_Grestoque)
Else
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Grestoque.value = ''
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Grestoque.refresh
endif
return(.t.)

grupo = ThisForm.get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value
If !IsEmpty(this.value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,grupo,'D',this.value,This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque,This)
		Messagebox('Acesso Negado !!',0+48,'')
		This.Value=''
		This.Refresh
		This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Value = ''
		This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Refresh
		return 0 
	Endif
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Value = ''
	This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Refresh
	return(.t.)
EndIf

grupo = ThisForm.get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value

		return 0

Else

EndIf
